applicability: Scheduled Commercial Banks, NBFCs, Payment Banks, Small Finance Banks

domains.description: Establish a Board-approved IT and Cyber Security Policy

controls.title: Cyber Security Policy
controls.requirement: Banks must have a Board-approved Cyber Security Policy separate from IT policy, reviewed annually.

controls.title: CISO Appointment
controls.requirement: A dedicated Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) must be appointed and report directly to the Board or senior management.

controls.title: IT Strategy Committee
controls.requirement: Board-level IT Strategy Committee to oversee IT-related matters including cyber security.

domains.description: Secure the entire IT infrastructure including networks, endpoints, and data centres

controls.title: Network Security
controls.requirement: Implement firewalls, IDS/IPS, network segmentation. DMZ mandatory for internet-facing systems.

controls.title: Endpoint Security
controls.requirement: All endpoints must have updated anti-malware, DLP, and host-based firewalls. BYOD policy required.

controls.title: Data Centre Security
controls.requirement: Physical and logical access controls for data centres. Biometric access, CCTV, and visitor logs mandatory.

controls.title: Patch Management
controls.requirement: Critical patches applied within 30 days; high-severity within 60 days. Tracked via a formal patch management process.

domains.description: Maintain a Security Operations Centre (SOC) and incident response capability

controls.title: Security Operations Centre (SOC)
controls.requirement: 24x7 SOC mandatory for large banks. Smaller banks may use shared/outsourced SOC with RBI approval.

controls.title: Incident Response Plan
controls.requirement: Documented IRP with defined roles, escalation matrix, and testing (tabletop exercises) at least once a year.

controls.title: Cyber Incident Reporting to RBI
controls.requirement: Cyber incidents must be reported to RBI within 2-6 hours of detection depending on severity.

domains.description: Secure all customer-facing and internal applications

controls.title: Secure SDLC
controls.requirement: Security integrated into the software development lifecycle. SAST/DAST mandatory before production releases.

controls.title: Internet Banking Security
controls.requirement: Multi-factor authentication for all internet banking transactions. SSL/TLS 1.2+ required.

controls.title: API Security
controls.requirement: APIs must be authenticated (OAuth 2.0/API keys), rate-limited, and logged. Open Banking APIs must follow RBI API guidelines.

domains.description: Ensure availability and recoverability of critical banking services

controls.title: Business Continuity Plan (BCP)
controls.requirement: Board-approved BCP covering cyber scenarios. RTO and RPO defined for all critical systems.

controls.title: Cyber Resilience Testing
controls.requirement: Annual red team exercises and penetration testing. Results shared with RBI on request.
